analystDecision: Press the best longs, but keep entries disciplined.
riskPosture: Risk is not gone. Respect the trim list and do not turn watchlist names into forced trades.
operatorSummary: The board reads constructive risk-on, with 6 buy setups and 2 risk-reduction names. Current evaluation history shows 100.0% 1D hit rate, so the edge looks real but still young.
nextSessionPlan: Open with MRVL, SMCI, AMD on the main board, keep SYM, ORCL marked for risk control, and let weaker holds prove themselves before touching them.
publishSummary: Fresh generated artifacts are ready for GitHub commit and Vercel rebuild.

newsItems.title: 2 Cash-Heavy Stocks with Promising Prospects and 1 We Ignore
newsItems.summary: A cash-heavy balance sheet is often a sign of strength, but not always. Some companies avoid debt because they have weak business models, limited expansion opportunities, or inconsistent cash flow.
